title: Interim Clinical Considerations for Use of Vaccine for Monkeypox Prevention in the United States | Monkeypox | CDC
text:
icated include ongoing risk of introduction of monkeypox into a community due to disease activity in another geographic area. The monkeypox outbreak that started in 2022 is still ongoing. 
This recommendation is on the CDC's Adult Immunization Schedule (for people 19 years of age and older) and Child & Adolescent Immunization Schedule (for people 18 years of age). 
Monkeypox 
Monkeypox is a viral disease that can be spread between people or between people and certain animals.
